{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170454C723874E20F9429CEBF5"}"},"total":578},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7335862024155923262","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"就真的很喜欢这本，我喜欢非哥那种对别人酷酷的帅帅的，在老公面前就完全不是一个样子，特别喜欢这种性格狠狠戳到我了，幸哥那种清冷美人真的很绝，内里又疯又se，真的这种人设在我这里永远排在前列各种人物性格也很鲜明，希望多出几对副cp，摸鱼和内卷那种故事也很好看(°ー°〃)喜欢喜欢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708015806,"group_id":"7307139239307660350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"●︿●","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx2du5QbjSWywtJ1QyPqpU0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"114784756305203","user_name":"用户11478475"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"114784756305203","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307139239307660350","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+游戏+抽卡+双洁+高岭之花+爽文】
【心狠手辣酷哥非酋受X高岭之花大美人欧皇攻】
社畜谢非沉迷一款抽卡游戏很久了，在179抽还没出金的时候，一气之下砸了电脑，然后眼前一黑昏迷了。
醒来之后，世界变成一款大型抽卡无限流游戏。
而他依然还是个非酋。
但可能是系统可怜他，给了他一个可以复制别人卡的技能，但复制到的都是等级最低的卡。
直到他遇到了一个欧皇，每次复制都能从欧皇那里偷到金卡。
谢非表示，这简直就是他的另一件外挂，所以他决定把自己和这个欧皇绑在一起。
他在周幸面前每天“哥哥”“哥哥”叫着。
一到需要哥哥救命的时候，更是不要脸，什么都能叫的出来。
“我叫你老公行了吧！老公，你能来救救你快要嗝屁的宝贝我了吗？”
“滚！”
口嫌体正直的大美人嘴里说着滚，其实已经把人救下了来了。
谢非表示：别看大美人是个高岭之花，其实玩的也挺花。
…
欧皇周幸是个高岭之花大美人，十连能出九个金的就是他
他对谢非的好奇完全来自于这个人总是给他一种很神秘的感觉，明明实力很不错，但偏偏运气不行，说他运气不行呢，还是能拿出几张金卡来的。
后来才知道，这人的金卡全是在他身上复制的。
他最开始以为谢非接近他是馋他美色，后来才知道只是在馋他的卡。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa7731768b915e36aaa40e0bd691caabf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"铁锅炖咩咩","author_id":"","book_id":"7307139239307660350","book_name":"你惹他干嘛，他老公是疯批啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9460人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7307272427413701182","read_count":"9460","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1428602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"578","tags":"双男主,现代,双洁,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/924b44e771672ca4d2e72b7eaab70e9c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181495&x-signature=jzBrEhIp5MuLTNbFr%2Bm%2B1B9ze40%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4270130747411694","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"160"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170454C723874E20F9429CEBF5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30650,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":39305},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7391368359156777753","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊，这种类型的无限流第一次看，太好看了，简直不够看啊，希望大大赶快更新，攻受的性格都很喜欢，他们之间的纠缠真的万万没想到，也是第一次看到攻居然是人偶转为人类，还特别喜欢攻的妈妈，前面看到攻这种性格，还觉得妈妈不太好，后面知道来龙去脉后，感觉妈妈真的好好啊，看后面是意思，妈妈是打算牺牲自己咩，但是没让两个宝贝知道。真的越来越期待后面的剧情了，真的很喜欢这本书，大大太会写了！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720939971,"group_id":"7307139239307660350","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwQB6KIuY5oybQ6psYKJSy8yRE4k5fD15gNRMoGC1Nlu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/83d9b53a39ea4a2a9ed6dd0bae3abb04~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536540&x-signature=AubIAkaETHGQE%2Bj8hqkX4vlS9EU%3D","user_id":"4432827898147111","user_name":"爱吃活竹酒的沐衡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4432827898147111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307139239307660350","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+游戏+抽卡+双洁+高岭之花+爽文】
